titleStmt.title: SII 26.64: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 64. (A.R. No. 62 of 1909.) TIRUKKAḺUKKUṈṞAM, CHINGLEPUT TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the kitchen in the Bhaktavatsalēśvara temple, right of entrance.

This inscription records the setting up of the shrine of Shaṇmukha-Piḷḷaiyār in the temple of Tirukkaḻukkuṉṟamuḍaiya-nāyaṉār by Vāṉavaṉ-Mahādēvi Uḍaiyāṉ Śivadāsar Ishabhavāhanadēvaṉ Tiruvēgambamuḍaiyān, the madhyastha of Vāṉavaṉmādēvichchaturvēdimaṅgalam in Āmūr-kkōṭṭam and the gift of four cows for a sandhi lamp to that shrine by the madhyastha mentioned above and his younger brother Āḷavandāṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . komāṟapaṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī vikramapāṇṭiyatevaṟku yāṇṭu 7varuṣam Eḻāvatu dhanunāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu
Uṭaiyār tirukkaḻukkuṉṟamuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil ṣaṇmukappiḷḷaiyārai Eḻuntaruḷuvitta cikaraṇattāṉ Āmurkkoṭṭattu vāṉavaṉmātevi
ccaturvetimaṅkalattu madhyasthaṉ vāṉavaṉmahātevi Uṭaiyāṉ civatāsar Iṣapavākaṉatevaṉ tiruvekampamuṭaiyāṉum Ivaṉtampi
Āḷavantāṉum Ippiḷḷaiyārkku vaitta cantiviḷakku Oṉṟukku Ikkoyil tirununtāviḷakkukkum maṉṟāṭikaḷil mātaṉāṉa tirukkaḻukkuṉṟak
koṉmakaṉ kuṉṟaṉeṉ kaikkoṇṭa pāṟpacu 1 ciṉaippacu 1 polimuṟai nāku 2 Āka Uru nālum kaikkoṇṭu muḻaikkoṉ makaṉ kānampi
vacam Iv Uru nālum kāṭṭikkuṭuttu Iccantiviḷakku Oṉṟukkum
Eṅkaḷ vamakiṣamRead vamcam •Uḷḷaḷavum Ivarkkaṉuppikkak kaṭaveṉ kuṉṟaṉeṉ
Ippaṭi kaikkoṇṭamaikku Ivai muḻaikkoṉ makaṉ kānampi Eḻuttu śrīmāheśvararakṣai §
Digital edition of SII 26.64 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
